mapper.select: SELECT batch_id AS batchId, batch_round AS batchRound, started_at AS startedAt, completed_at AS completedAt, deadline_at AS deadlineAt, status, created_at AS createdAt FROM batches WHERE batch_id = #{batchId}

SELECT batch_id AS batchId, batch_round AS batchRound, started_at AS startedAt, completed_at AS completedAt, deadline_at AS deadlineAt, status, created_at AS createdAt FROM batches WHERE status = 'IN_PROGRESS' ORDER BY deadline_at ASC LIMIT 1
